title: Quick Start Guide - Emu - First Screen, Charge Case/ Pairing 1 - zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide zoom in/out fails on first screen when clicking the Charge Case blue circle button
steps: Go to Device Settings > Quick Start Guide
Click the blue circle button on Charge Case
Click the blue circle button again
expected: 1) The earbud zooms in and text matches Figma Pairing (Option 1) screen. 2) The screen zooms out to the original view.
